This page informs you of our policies regarding the collection, use and disclosure of Personal Information we receive from users of the app. By clicking Ok, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy. 

Information Collection And Use

No personal information is collected or stored by the app. Only image submitted by user is stored.

Posting restrictions

* all upladed image will be moderated and only appropriate images will be uploaded to the app
* only images that suit app theme will be approved
* unappropriate images will be deleted
* you must not upload content not originally created by you, or any content which is not proprly licensed to you by someone elsefor uploading or contributing.
